title: Architecture boundary checklist
scope: module boundary, platform adapter, provider, handler, or workflow changes

items.evidenceRequired: Platform core does not import backend framework or built-in modules.
Architecture report has no unbaselined warning and no baselined hotspot growth.
New modules, routes, workflows, jobs, storefront entrypoints, site profiles, and AI scripts are registered in the inventory baseline.
Handlers receive declared service-token scopes, not arbitrary containers.
Backend-specific module/service bindings live in adapters.
Backend unit tests pass after boundary changes.
